title: indigofera denudata
intro: Indigofera denudata, also known as Naked Indigo or Chinese Indigo, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of Indigofera denudata have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, offering benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Indigofera denudata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make herbal remedies.
